description: Read the specification at ~/Desktop/ups_monitoring_spec.txt. Create an SNMPv3 credential named 'Facility-UPS-V3' (Auth: SHA / 'AuthPassword2024', Priv: AES-128 / 'PrivPassword2024'). Then, create a new device template named 'Datacenter-UPS-Premium' (Vendor: APC, Category: UPS, SysOID: '.1.3.6.1.4.1.318.1.3.27') and add a custom monitor to it named 'Battery-Remaining-Capacity' with OID '.1.3.6.1.4.1.318.1.1.1.2.2.1.0' and a 2-minute interval. Finally, create an Email notification profile named 'Facilities-Power-Alert' targeting 'power-ops@datacenter.internal' for alarms on UPS devices. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
